message:
🐛 Fix Resource Marshall scroll-to-top when selecting workload (#774)

* 🐛 Fix Resource Marshall scroll-to-top when selecting workload

When selecting a workload in the Resource Marshall card, the dashboard
would scroll to the top because resolve() cleared dependency data
(setData(null)) before fetching, collapsing the card content and
causing the CSS grid row to shrink. Now keeps previous data visible
during loading (stale-while-revalidate pattern).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Skip OPA checks for offline clusters + add cluster health todo

- Filter out unreachable clusters from OPA policy checks
- Show "Offline" status for unreachable clusters instead of "Not installed"
- Only run Gatekeeper checks against clusters that are reachable
- Add cluster health false-positive task to tasks.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 OPA Policies: add skeleton loading state and offline icon

- Show CardSkeleton while OPA checks are running (no more empty card)
- Report proper loading state to CardWrapper for refresh icon animation
- Use WifiOff icon for offline clusters instead of XCircle/text
- Skeleton displays until at least one cluster check completes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
